column1: # Benchmark sweep for martini_pipeline hpc_defaults calibration.
#   label            — short identifier used as the per-point output directory name
#   sims_per_node    — parallel gmx mdrun slots per node
#   gpus_per_node    — GPUs requested per node (0 = CPU-only)
#   partition        — SLURM partition (overridden to the value passed to benchmark_hpc.sh
#                      for GPU points; used as-is for CPU points with gpus_per_node=0)
# gpu_test cap: max 4 GPUs per job.  All GPU rows respect this limit.
# CPU baseline (row 8) uses general1 partition regardless of --partition.
